1	# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2025-2026 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
2	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
3	#
4	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
5	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
6	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
7	#
8	# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
9	#
10	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
11	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14	# limitations under the License.
15	"""
16	Auto-dispatch model factory and parameter utilities.
17	
18	``AutoModel.from_pretrained`` reads a checkpoint config, picks the right model
19	class, constructs it, and loads weights — the primary entry point for callers.
20	
21	Custom model classes can be registered via :func:`register_model` to override
22	the default :class:`~models.default.modeling_default.CausalLM` for a given
23	``model_type`` string.
24	"""
25	
26	import dataclasses
27	import logging
28	import os
29	from typing import Callable, Dict, Type
30	
31	import torch.nn as nn
32	
33	from .checkpoint.checkpoint_utils import load_checkpoint_config_dicts
34	from .checkpoint.loader import load_weights
35	from .config import (QUANT_FP16, QUANT_INT4_AWQ, QUANT_INT4_AWQ_MODELOPT,
36	                     QUANT_INT4_GPTQ, QUANT_MXFP8, QUANT_NVFP4, ModelConfig,
37	                     make_dflash_draft_config, make_mtp_draft_config,
38	                     module_quant_type)
39	
40	__all__ = [
41	    "AutoModel", "load_model_config", "register_attention_scale_default",
42	    "register_model", "standard_attention_scale", "dtype_summary",
43	    "param_count"
44	]
45	
46	AttentionScaleDefault = Callable[[int], float]
47	_MODEL_REGISTRY: Dict[str, Type[nn.Module]] = {}
48	_ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY: Dict[str, AttentionScaleDefault] = {}
49	
50	
51	def standard_attention_scale(head_dim: int) -> float:
52	    return 1.0 / (float(head_dim)**0.5)
53	
54	
55	_QWEN3_5_MTP_BASE_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset({
56	    "qwen3_5_text",
57	    "qwen3_5_moe",
58	    "qwen3_5_moe_text",
59	})
60	_QWEN3_5_MTP_DRAFT_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset({
61	    "qwen3_5_text",
62	})
63	
64	
65	def _is_qwen3_5_mtp_base_supported(model_type: str) -> bool:
66	    return model_type in _QWEN3_5_MTP_BASE_MODEL_TYPES
67	
68	
69	def _is_qwen3_5_mtp_draft_supported(model_type: str) -> bool:
70	    return model_type in _QWEN3_5_MTP_DRAFT_MODEL_TYPES
71	
72	
73	_GROUP_SIZE_LM_HEAD_QUANTS = frozenset({
74	    QUANT_INT4_AWQ,
75	    QUANT_INT4_AWQ_MODELOPT,
76	    QUANT_INT4_GPTQ,
77	    QUANT_MXFP8,
78	    QUANT_NVFP4,
79	})
80	
81	
82	def register_model(model_type: str, model_class: Type[nn.Module],
83	                   default_attention_scale: AttentionScaleDefault) -> None:
84	    """Register *model_class* as the handler for *model_type*.
85	
86	    When :meth:`AutoModel.from_pretrained` encounters a checkpoint whose
87	    ``model_type`` field equals *model_type*, it instantiates *model_class*
88	    instead of the built-in :class:`~models.default.modeling_default.CausalLM`.
89	
90	    Args:
91	        model_type:  Value of ``model_type`` in the checkpoint ``config.json``.
92	        model_class: ``nn.Module`` subclass; must accept a single
93	                     :class:`~config.ModelConfig` as its constructor argument.
94	        default_attention_scale: Function returning this family's default for
95	                     a given attention head dimension.
96	    """
97	    _MODEL_REGISTRY[model_type] = model_class
98	    _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY[model_type] = default_attention_scale
99	
100	
101	def register_attention_scale_default(
102	        model_type: str,
103	        default_attention_scale: AttentionScaleDefault) -> None:
104	    """Register a default for a model type with special factory dispatch."""
105	    _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY[model_type] = default_attention_scale
106	
107	
108	def load_model_config(model_dir: str) -> ModelConfig:
109	    """Load ModelConfig using the default declared by its model family."""
110	    root, llm_dict = load_checkpoint_config_dicts(model_dir)
111	    default_attention_scale = standard_attention_scale
112	    for config in (root, llm_dict):
113	        model_type = config.get("model_type")
114	        if model_type in _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY:
115	            default_attention_scale = _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY[
116	                model_type]
117	            break
118	    return ModelConfig.from_pretrained(model_dir, default_attention_scale)
119	
120	
121	class AutoModel:
122	    """HuggingFace-style factory that dispatches on ``model_type``."""
123	
124	    @classmethod
125	    def from_pretrained(cls,
126	                        model_dir: str,
127	                        device: str = "cpu",
128	                        key_remap=None,
129	                        key_prefix: "str | None" = None,
130	                        eagle_base: bool = False,
131	                        reduced_vocab_dir: "str | None" = None,
132	                        mtp_base: bool = False,
133	                        mtp_draft: bool = False,
134	                        tp_size: int = 1,
135	                        tp_rank: int = 0,
136	                        dflash_base: bool = False,
137	                        dflash_tree_base: bool = False,
138	                        dflash_draft: bool = False,
139	                        dflash_draft_dir: "str | None" = None,
140	                        gemma4_mtp_base: bool = False,
141	                        gemma4_mtp_draft: bool = False,
142	                        gemma4_kv_sharing_map: "list[dict] | None" = None,
143	                        gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant: "str | None" = None,
144	                        num_decoder_layers: "int | None" = None) -> nn.Module:
145	        """Construct and load a model from *model_dir*.
146	
147	        Reads ``config.json`` via :class:`~config.ModelConfig`, looks up the
148	        model class in the registry (falling back to the built-in
149	        :class:`~models.default.modeling_default.CausalLM`), instantiates it,
150	        moves it to *device*, and loads safetensors weights.
151	
152	        Args:
153	            model_dir:      Local HF checkpoint directory.
154	            device:         Target device (e.g. ``"cpu"``, ``"cuda:0"``).
155	            key_remap:      Optional callable ``(key: str) -> Optional[str]``.
156	                            Passed through to :func:`load_weights` for checkpoint
157	                            key remapping (e.g. TTS talker ``codec_embedding``
158	                            → ``embed_tokens``).
159	            key_prefix:     Explicit checkpoint key prefix to strip (e.g.
160	                            ``"talker."``).  Passed through to :func:`load_weights`.
161	            eagle_base:     When True, export as EAGLE3 base model with extra
162	                            tree-attention inputs and hidden_states output.
163	            reduced_vocab_dir:
164	                            Optional directory containing ``vocab_map.safetensors``.
165	            mtp_base:       When True, export the standard Qwen3.5 text model as
166	                            the MTP base variant.
167	            mtp_draft:      When True, build the dedicated Qwen3.5 dense MTP
168	                            draft model from the base checkpoint config.
169	            tp_size:        Tensor-parallel world size.  When >1 the config
170	                            is reduced to per-rank shapes via
171	                            :meth:`ModelConfig.for_rank`, and weights
172	                            are sharded on assignment.  Default 1 = no TP.
173	            tp_rank:        This rank's index in [0, tp_size).
174	            dflash_base:    When True, export as DFlash base model.
175	            dflash_tree_base:
176	                            When True, add DDTree parent/depth metadata inputs
177	                            for Qwen3.5 hybrid state execution.
178	            dflash_draft:   When True, build the DFlash draft model.
179	            dflash_draft_dir:
180	                            Path to the DFlash draft checkpoint directory.
181	            gemma4_mtp_base:
182	                            Export a Gemma4 target checkpoint as the base
183	                            engine for paired Gemma4 MTP.
184	            gemma4_mtp_draft:
185	                            Export/load a paired Gemma4 assistant checkpoint.
186	            gemma4_kv_sharing_map:
187	                            Validated assistant-layer to target-layer map for
188	                            Gemma4 MTP draft runtime config.
189	            gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant:
190	                            Target/base KV-cache quantization mode inherited by
191	                            Gemma4 MTP draft inputs that alias target KV cache.
192	            num_decoder_layers:
193	                            When set, truncate the model to only the first N
194	                            decoder layers (few-layer numeric validation).
195	                            Only supported for the plain default ``CausalLM``
196	                            path (e.g. Qwen3); rejected for eagle/mtp/dflash and
197	                            registered non-default variants. The checkpoint's
198	                            extra-layer weights are simply skipped by the loader.
199	
200	        Returns:
201	            Loaded ``nn.Module`` in eval mode.
202	        """
203	        from .models.default.modeling_default import CausalLM
204	
205	        config = load_model_config(model_dir)
206	        if eagle_base:
207	            config.eagle_base = True
208	        if mtp_base or config.mtp_base:
209	            config.mtp_base = True
210	        if gemma4_mtp_base:
211	            config.gemma4_mtp_base = True
212	        if dflash_base:
213	            config.dflash_base = True
214	        if dflash_tree_base:
215	            config.dflash_base = True
216	            config.dflash_tree_base = True
217	        elif config.dflash_tree_base:
218	            config.dflash_base = True
219	        if config.dflash_base:
220	            # Read target_layer_ids from DFlash draft checkpoint if provided
221	            if not config.dflash_target_layer_ids and dflash_draft_dir:
222	                import json
223	                draft_cfg_path = os.path.join(dflash_draft_dir, "config.json")
224	                if os.path.isfile(draft_cfg_path):
225	                    with open(draft_cfg_path) as f:
226	                        draft_cfg = json.load(f)
227	                    dflash_cfg = draft_cfg.get("dflash_config", {})
228	                    config.dflash_target_layer_ids = dflash_cfg.get(
229	                        "target_layer_ids", [1, 8, 15, 22, 29])
230	                    config.dflash_block_size = dflash_cfg.get("block_size", 16)
231	                    config.dflash_mask_token_id = dflash_cfg.get(
232	                        "mask_token_id", 248070)
233	            if not config.dflash_target_layer_ids:
234	                config.dflash_target_layer_ids = [1, 8, 15, 22, 29]
235	        if tp_size > 1:
236	            config = config.for_rank(tp_rank, tp_size)
237	
238	        variant = _resolve_model_variant(config,
239	                                         eagle_base=eagle_base,
240	                                         mtp_base=config.mtp_base,
241	                                         mtp_draft=mtp_draft,
242	                                         dflash_base=config.dflash_base,
243	                                         dflash_draft=dflash_draft,
244	                                         gemma4_mtp_base=gemma4_mtp_base,
245	                                         gemma4_mtp_draft=gemma4_mtp_draft)
246	
247	        # EAGLE3 draft: auto-detect from draft_vocab_size
248	        if variant == "eagle3_draft":
249	            from .models.eagle3.modeling_eagle3_draft import Eagle3DraftModel
250	            model_class = Eagle3DraftModel
251	            # Set up key remapping: midlayer -> layers.0, skip t2d
252	            if key_remap is None:
253	                key_remap = _eagle3_key_remap
254	        elif variant == "mtp_draft":
255	            # TODO: support other model types
256	            if not _is_qwen3_5_mtp_draft_supported(config.model_type):
257	                raise NotImplementedError(
258	                    "MTP draft is only supported for qwen3_5_text checkpoints; "
259	                    f"got {config.model_type!r}.")
260	            from .models.qwen3_5 import Qwen3_5MtpDraftModel
261	            tie_word_embeddings = config.tie_word_embeddings
262	            config = make_mtp_draft_config(config)
263	            model_class = Qwen3_5MtpDraftModel
264	            if key_remap is None:
265	
266	                def key_remap(key):
267	                    return _mtp_key_remap(
268	                        key, tie_word_embeddings=tie_word_embeddings)
269	
270	        elif variant == "dflash_draft":
271	            if dflash_draft_dir is None:
272	                raise ValueError(
273	                    "dflash_draft requires dflash_draft_dir to be set.")
274	            from .models.dflash.modeling_dflash_draft import DFlashDraftModel
275	            base_config = config
276	            base_model_dir = model_dir
277	            base_tie_word_embeddings = base_config.tie_word_embeddings
278	            draft_has_lm_head = _checkpoint_has_dflash_lm_head(
279	                dflash_draft_dir)
280	            config = make_dflash_draft_config(dflash_draft_dir,
281	                                              standard_attention_scale)
282	            if not draft_has_lm_head:
283	                config = _inherit_dflash_lm_head_quant(config, base_config)
284	            model_class = DFlashDraftModel
285	            model_dir = dflash_draft_dir
286	            if key_remap is None:
287	                key_remap = _dflash_key_remap
288	        elif variant == "gemma4_mtp_draft":
289	            if config.root_model_type != "gemma4_assistant":
290	                raise ValueError(
291	                    "Gemma4 MTP draft requires a gemma4_assistant checkpoint.")
292	            from .models.gemma4 import Gemma4AssistantForCausalLM
293	            config.gemma4_mtp_draft = True
294	            config.shares_target_kv = True
295	            config.has_own_kv_cache = False
296	            config.constant_draft_positions = True
297	            config.returns_feedback_hidden = True
298	            config.assistant_hidden_size = config.hidden_size
299	            config.kv_sharing_map = list(gemma4_kv_sharing_map or [])
300	            if gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant is not None:
301	                config.quant.kv_cache_quant = gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant
302	            model_class = Gemma4AssistantForCausalLM
303	        else:
304	            if (variant == "mtp_base"
305	                    and not _is_qwen3_5_mtp_base_supported(config.model_type)):
306	                raise NotImplementedError(
307	                    "Qwen3.5 MTP base is only supported for qwen3_5_text "
308	                    "qwen3_5_moe, or qwen3_5_moe_text checkpoints; "
309	                    f"got {config.model_type!r}.")
310	            if variant == "gemma4_mtp_base":
311	                if config.model_type not in ("gemma4", "gemma4_text"):
312	                    raise ValueError(
313	                        "Gemma4 MTP base requires a gemma4/gemma4_text target checkpoint."
314	                    )
315	                from .models.gemma4 import Gemma4ForCausalLM
316	                config.gemma4_mtp_base = True
317	                model_class = Gemma4ForCausalLM
318	            else:
319	                # DFlash base is supported for both Qwen3.5 hybrid (qwen3_5_text) and
320	                # dense Qwen3 (default CausalLM). Dense models use the Transformer's
321	                # dflash_target_layer_ids parameter to collect target-layer hidden states.
322	                model_class = _MODEL_REGISTRY.get(config.model_type, CausalLM)
323	
324	        # 4-layer numeric validation: truncate to the first N decoder
325	        # layers.  The whole pipeline is config-driven (the Transformer builds
326	        # layers from ``config.num_hidden_layers`` / ``config.layer_types``,
327	        # ``onnx_export_spec`` derives the KV / recurrent / conv I/O counts from
328	        # them, the runtime config.json is written from ``model.config``, and the
329	        # loader silently skips checkpoint keys for the dropped layers), so a
330	        # single config override is sufficient and the modeling code needs no
331	        # change.  This covers the plain default ``CausalLM`` path (e.g. Qwen3)
332	        # AND registered hybrid base models (Qwen3.5 linear+full / Gated DeltaNet,
333	        # Nemotron-H Mamba), which also build per-layer from ``layer_types``.  The
334	        # eagle/mtp/dflash/gemma4-mtp speculative-decoding variants have a
335	        # different per-layer structure and remain out of scope.
336	        if num_decoder_layers is not None:
337	            if (eagle_base or config.eagle_base or mtp_base or config.mtp_base
338	                    or dflash_base or config.dflash_base or mtp_draft
339	                    or dflash_draft or gemma4_mtp_base
340	                    or config.gemma4_mtp_base or gemma4_mtp_draft
341	                    or config.gemma4_mtp_draft):
342	                raise NotImplementedError(
343	                    "num_decoder_layers cannot be combined with the "
344	                    "eagle/mtp/dflash/gemma4-mtp speculative-decoding variants."
345	                )
346	            if not 1 <= num_decoder_layers <= config.num_hidden_layers:
347	                raise ValueError(
348	                    f"num_decoder_layers={num_decoder_layers} out of range "
349	                    f"[1, {config.num_hidden_layers}].")
350	            config.num_hidden_layers = num_decoder_layers
351	            # Keep per-layer lists consistent with the truncated layer count.
352	            if config.layer_types:
353	                config.layer_types = config.layer_types[:num_decoder_layers]
354	            logging.getLogger(__name__).info(
355	                "num_decoder_layers: truncated to first %d decoder layers",
356	                num_decoder_layers)
357	
358	        model = model_class(config)
359	        model.to(device)
360	
361	        pre_repack_hook = None
362	        apply_reduced_vocab_after_load = False
363	        if reduced_vocab_dir is not None:
364	            from .vocab_reduction.onnx_export import (
365	                apply_reduced_vocab, load_reduced_vocab_map,
366	                should_apply_reduced_vocab_before_repacking)
367	            vocab_map = load_reduced_vocab_map(reduced_vocab_dir,
368	                                               vocab_size=config.vocab_size,
369	                                               device=device)
370	            if should_apply_reduced_vocab_before_repacking(model):
371	
372	                def _apply_pre_repack_reduced_vocab(loaded_model: nn.Module):
373	                    apply_reduced_vocab(loaded_model, vocab_map)
374	                    loaded_model._reduced_vocab_dir = reduced_vocab_dir
375	
376	                pre_repack_hook = _apply_pre_repack_reduced_vocab
377	            else:
378	                apply_reduced_vocab_after_load = True
379	
380	        if variant == "dflash_draft" and not draft_has_lm_head:
381	            next_pre_repack_hook = pre_repack_hook
382	
383	            def _load_pre_repack_dflash_lm_head(loaded_model: nn.Module):
384	                _load_dflash_lm_head(
385	                    loaded_model,
386	                    base_model_dir,
387	                    device,
388	                    tie_word_embeddings=base_tie_word_embeddings)
389	                if next_pre_repack_hook is not None:
390	                    next_pre_repack_hook(loaded_model)
391	
392	            pre_repack_hook = _load_pre_repack_dflash_lm_head
393	
394	        load_weights(model,
395	                     model_dir,
396	                     device=device,
397	                     key_remap=key_remap,
398	                     key_prefix=key_prefix,
399	                     pre_repack_hook=pre_repack_hook,
400	                     mapping=config.mapping)
401	        if variant == "dflash_draft":
402	            if draft_has_lm_head:
403	                logging.getLogger(__name__).info(
404	                    "DFlash lm_head source: draft checkpoint buffers")
405	        if apply_reduced_vocab_after_load:
406	            from .vocab_reduction.onnx_export import \
407	                apply_reduced_vocab_from_dir
408	            apply_reduced_vocab_from_dir(model, reduced_vocab_dir)
409	
410	        # Post-load optimisation: fuse GDN input projections for Qwen3.5 / Qwen3.5-MoE.
411	        if (config.model_type in ("qwen3_5_text", "qwen3_5_moe_text")
412	                and not mtp_draft):
413	            from .models.qwen3_5 import fuse_gdn_input_projections
414	            fuse_gdn_input_projections(model)
415	
416	        return model
417	
418	
419	def param_count(model: nn.Module) -> int:
420	    """Return total parameter element count (trainable and frozen)."""
421	    return sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
422	
423	
424	def dtype_summary(model: nn.Module) -> Dict[str, int]:
425	    """Map dtype name -> number of parameter elements."""
426	    out: Dict[str, int] = {}
427	    for p in model.parameters():
428	        name = str(p.dtype).replace("torch.", "")
429	        out[name] = out.get(name, 0) + p.numel()
430	    return dict(sorted(out.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]))
431	
432	
433	def _inherit_dflash_lm_head_quant(draft_config: ModelConfig,
434	                                  base_config: ModelConfig) -> ModelConfig:
435	    """Make an old DFlash draft build a loadable shared lm_head.
436	
437	    Older DFlash drafts may omit ``lm_head.*`` and reuse the base output head.
438	    When that head is quantized, mirror its layout only for the draft ``lm_head``
439	    so the fallback loader can copy the base sidecar tensors.
440	    """
441	    lm_head_quant = module_quant_type("lm_head", base_config)
442	    if lm_head_quant == QUANT_FP16:
443	        return draft_config
444	
445	    draft_quant = draft_config.quant
446	    base_quant = base_config.quant
447	    use_base_group_size = lm_head_quant in _GROUP_SIZE_LM_HEAD_QUANTS
448	    if (use_base_group_size and draft_quant.quant_type != QUANT_FP16
449	            and draft_quant.group_size != base_quant.group_size):
450	        raise ValueError(
451	            "DFlash draft cannot share %s base lm_head with a different "
452	            "draft quantization group size." % lm_head_quant)
453	
454	    layer_overrides = dict(draft_quant.layer_overrides)
455	    layer_overrides["lm_head"] = lm_head_quant
456	    excluded = [name for name in draft_quant.excluded if name != "lm_head"]
457	    quant_updates = {
458	        "excluded": excluded,
459	        "layer_overrides": layer_overrides,
460	    }
461	    if use_base_group_size:
462	        quant_updates["group_size"] = base_quant.group_size
463	    if lm_head_quant == QUANT_INT4_GPTQ:
464	        quant_updates[
465	            "gptq_zero_point_offset"] = base_quant.gptq_zero_point_offset
466	    quant = dataclasses.replace(draft_quant, **quant_updates)
467	    return dataclasses.replace(draft_config, quant=quant)
468	
469	
470	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
471	# EAGLE3 helpers
472	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
473	
474	
475	def _resolve_model_variant(config: ModelConfig,
476	                           *,
477	                           eagle_base: bool,
478	                           mtp_base: bool,
479	                           mtp_draft: bool,
480	                           dflash_base: bool = False,
481	                           dflash_draft: bool = False,
482	                           gemma4_mtp_base: bool = False,
483	                           gemma4_mtp_draft: bool = False) -> str:
484	    """Resolve the requested model variant while keeping EAGLE3 behavior intact."""
485	    if eagle_base and mtp_base:
486	        raise ValueError("eagle_base and mtp_base cannot both be enabled.")
487	    if eagle_base and mtp_draft:
488	        raise ValueError("eagle_base and mtp_draft cannot both be enabled.")
489	    if mtp_base and mtp_draft:
490	        raise ValueError("mtp_base and mtp_draft cannot both be enabled.")
491	    if dflash_base and dflash_draft:
492	        raise ValueError(
493	            "dflash_base and dflash_draft cannot both be enabled.")
494	    if dflash_base and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft):
495	        raise ValueError(
496	            "dflash_base cannot be combined with eagle/mtp variants.")
497	    if dflash_draft and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft):
498	        raise ValueError(
499	            "dflash_draft cannot be combined with eagle/mtp variants.")
500	    if gemma4_mtp_base and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft or dflash_base
501	                            or dflash_draft):
502	        raise ValueError(
503	            "gemma4_mtp_base cannot be combined with other speculative variants."
504	        )
505	    if gemma4_mtp_draft and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft or dflash_base
506	                             or dflash_draft):
507	        raise ValueError(
508	            "gemma4_mtp_draft cannot be combined with other speculative variants."
509	        )
510	    if gemma4_mtp_base and gemma4_mtp_draft:
511	        raise ValueError(
512	            "gemma4_mtp_base and gemma4_mtp_draft cannot both be enabled.")
513	    if config.is_eagle3_draft:
514	        if mtp_base or mtp_draft:
515	            raise ValueError(
516	                "EAGLE3 draft checkpoints cannot be loaded as Qwen3.5 MTP variants."
517	            )
518	        return "eagle3_draft"
519	    if gemma4_mtp_draft:
520	        return "gemma4_mtp_draft"
521	    if dflash_draft:
522	        return "dflash_draft"
523	    if dflash_base:
524	        return "dflash_base"
525	    if mtp_draft:
526	        return "mtp_draft"
527	    if mtp_base:
528	        return "mtp_base"
529	    if gemma4_mtp_base:
530	        return "gemma4_mtp_base"
531	    if eagle_base:
532	        return "eagle_base"
533	    return "llm"
534	
535	
536	def _eagle3_key_remap(key: str) -> "str | None":
537	    """Remap EAGLE3 draft checkpoint keys.
538	
539	    Handles all known EAGLE3 draft checkpoint variations:
540	    - ``t2d`` keys are skipped (but ``d2t`` is kept).
541	    - ``target_model.*`` keys are skipped (multi-target training artifact).
542	    - ``midlayer.*`` -> ``layers.0.*``
543	    - ``qkv_proj.{q,k,v}_proj`` -> ``{q,k,v}_proj`` (flatten old pipeline
544	      ``EdgeLLMAttention`` wrapper nesting, used by quantized checkpoints).
545	    - ``._pre_quant_scale`` -> ``.pre_quant_scale`` (modelopt internal naming;
546	      normally stripped by ``postprocess_state_dict()`` but not by per-module
547	      export via ``_export_quantized_weight()``).
548	    """
549	    if "t2d" in key and "d2t" not in key:
550	        return None  # skip t2d
551	    if key.startswith("target_model."):
552	        return None  # skip multi-target training artifact
553	    key = key.replace("midlayer.", "layers.0.")
554	    key = key.replace("qkv_proj.q_proj", "q_proj")
555	    key = key.replace("qkv_proj.k_proj", "k_proj")
556	    key = key.replace("qkv_proj.v_proj", "v_proj")
557	    key = key.replace("._pre_quant_scale", ".pre_quant_scale")
558	    return key
559	
560	
561	def _load_dflash_lm_head(model: nn.Module,
562	                         base_model_dir: str,
563	                         device: str,
564	                         *,
565	                         tie_word_embeddings: bool = True) -> None:
566	    """Load the DFlash draft lm_head from the base model checkpoint.
567	
568	    Deterministic source selection (matching MTP pattern):
569	      1. Explicit ``lm_head.weight`` from the base checkpoint.
570	      2. Embedding fallback *only* when ``tie_word_embeddings=True``.
571	      3. Otherwise fail loudly — untied models must not use embeddings.
572	
573	    This helper is used only for old DFlash draft checkpoints that do not carry
574	    ``lm_head.*`` tensors.  Quantized checkpoints, and dense checkpoints that
575	    explicitly save ``lm_head.weight``, are loaded by the generic checkpoint
576	    loader and must not be overwritten from the base embedding table.
577	    """
578	    import logging
579	    import os
580	
581	    import torch
582	
583	    from .models.linear import FP16Linear
584	
585	    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
586	    lm_head = getattr(model, "lm_head", None)
587	    if lm_head is None:
588	        logger.warning("DFlash draft model has no lm_head; skipping.")
589	        return
590	
591	    from .checkpoint.loader import _build_shard_map
592	    shard_map = _build_shard_map(base_model_dir)
593	
594	    if not isinstance(lm_head, FP16Linear):
595	        _load_dflash_quantized_lm_head(model, lm_head, shard_map,
596	                                       base_model_dir, device)
597	        return
598	
599	    # --- Determine source key with strict priority ---
600	    lm_head_candidates = [
601	        "lm_head.weight",
602	        "model.lm_head.weight",
603	        "language_model.lm_head.weight",
604	        "model.language_model.lm_head.weight",
605	    ]
606	    embed_candidates = [
607	        "model.embed_tokens.weight",
608	        "embed_tokens.weight",
609	        "model.language_model.embed_tokens.weight",
610	        "language_model.model.embed_tokens.weight",
611	    ]
612	
613	    # Priority 1: explicit lm_head.weight from base checkpoint
614	    source_key = None
615	    source_type = None
616	    for cand in lm_head_candidates:
617	        if cand in shard_map:
618	            source_key = cand
619	            source_type = "lm_head"
620	            break
621	
622	    # Priority 2: embedding fallback only if tie_word_embeddings
623	    if source_key is None:
624	        if tie_word_embeddings:
625	            for cand in embed_candidates:
626	                if cand in shard_map:
627	                    source_key = cand
628	                    source_type = "tied_embedding"
629	                    break
630	        else:
631	            raise ValueError(
632	                "DFlash lm_head: base model at %s has "
633	                "tie_word_embeddings=False but no lm_head.weight found. "
634	                "Cannot safely fall back to embed_tokens." % base_model_dir)
635	
636	    if source_key is None:
637	        raise ValueError(
638	            "Cannot find lm_head.weight or embed_tokens.weight in "
639	            "base model at %s." % base_model_dir)
640	
641	    shard_path = shard_map[source_key]
642	    if source_type == "tied_embedding":
643	        logger.info("DFlash lm_head source: %s (tied fallback) from %s",
644	                    source_key, os.path.basename(shard_path))
645	    else:
646	        logger.info("DFlash lm_head source: %s from %s", source_key,
647	                    os.path.basename(shard_path))
648	
649	    source_weight = _read_dflash_checkpoint_tensor(shard_path, source_key,
650	                                                   device)
651	
652	    # --- Copy weight into model's dense lm_head ---
653	    if source_weight.shape != lm_head.weight.shape:
654	        raise ValueError(
655	            f"DFlash lm_head shape mismatch: source={source_weight.shape} "
656	            f"vs lm_head={lm_head.weight.shape}")
657	    with torch.no_grad():
658	        lm_head.weight.copy_(source_weight.to(lm_head.weight.dtype))
659	
660	
661	def _load_dflash_quantized_lm_head(model: nn.Module, lm_head: nn.Module,
662	                                   shard_map: Dict[str, str],
663	                                   base_model_dir: str, device: str) -> None:
664	    """Load quantized lm_head sidecar tensors shared from the base checkpoint."""
665	    import logging
666	    import os
667	
668	    from .checkpoint.loader import _set_tensor
669	
670	    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
671	    source_prefixes = (
672	        "lm_head",
673	        "model.lm_head",
674	        "language_model.lm_head",
675	        "model.language_model.lm_head",
676	    )
677	    target_state = lm_head.state_dict()
678	    missing = []
679	    source_by_target = {}
680	    optional_tensors = {"g_idx", "int4_act_perm", "pre_quant_scale"}
681	
682	    for target_name in target_state:
683	        source_key = next((f"{prefix}.{target_name}"
684	                           for prefix in source_prefixes
685	                           if f"{prefix}.{target_name}" in shard_map), None)
686	        if source_key is None:
687	            if target_name not in optional_tensors:
688	                missing.append(target_name)
689	            continue
690	        source_by_target[target_name] = source_key
691	
692	    if missing:
693	        raise ValueError(
694	            "DFlash quantized lm_head fallback requires base checkpoint tensors "
695	            "for %s; missing %s in %s." % (", ".join(
696	                target_state.keys()), ", ".join(missing), base_model_dir))
697	
698	    loaded_tensors = []
699	    for target_name, source_key in source_by_target.items():
700	        target_tensor = target_state[target_name]
701	
702	        source_tensor = _read_dflash_checkpoint_tensor(shard_map[source_key],
703	                                                       source_key, device)
704	        source_tensor = _normalize_dflash_lm_head_tensor_shape(
705	            target_name, source_tensor, target_tensor)
706	        loaded_tensors.append((target_name, source_key, source_tensor))
707	
708	    loaded = []
709	    for target_name, source_key, source_tensor in loaded_tensors:
710	        if not _set_tensor(model,
711	                           f"lm_head.{target_name}",
712	                           source_tensor,
713	                           mapping=model.config.mapping):
714	            raise ValueError(
715	                f"Failed to assign DFlash lm_head tensor {target_name!r}.")
716	        loaded.append(source_key)
717	
718	    logger.info(
719	        "DFlash lm_head source: quantized base checkpoint buffers from %s",
720	        ", ".join(sorted({os.path.basename(shard_map[key])
721	                          for key in loaded})))
722	
723	
724	def _read_dflash_checkpoint_tensor(shard_path: str, key: str, device: str):
725	    import torch
726	    from safetensors import safe_open
727	
728	    if shard_path.endswith(".bin"):
729	        state = torch.load(shard_path, map_location=device, weights_only=True)
730	        return state[key]
731	    with safe_open(shard_path, framework="pt", device=device) as f:
732	        return f.get_tensor(key)
733	
734	
735	def _normalize_dflash_lm_head_tensor_shape(target_name: str, source, target):
736	    if source.shape == target.shape:
737	        return source
738	    if source.numel() == 1 and target.numel() == 1:
739	        return source.reshape(target.shape)
740	    raise ValueError(
741	        "DFlash quantized lm_head shape mismatch for %s: source=%s vs "
742	        "lm_head=%s" % (target_name, source.shape, target.shape))
743	
744	
745	def _checkpoint_has_dflash_lm_head(model_dir: str) -> bool:
746	    """Return whether a DFlash draft checkpoint owns lm_head tensors."""
747	    from .checkpoint.loader import _build_shard_map
748	
749	    for key in _build_shard_map(model_dir):
750	        mapped = _dflash_key_remap(key)
751	        if mapped is not None and mapped.startswith("lm_head."):
752	            return True
753	    return False
754	
755	
756	def _dflash_key_remap(key: str) -> "str | None":
757	    """Remap DFlash draft checkpoint keys."""
758	    if "rotary_emb" in key:
759	        return None
760	    return key
761	
762	
763	def _mtp_key_remap(key: str, *, tie_word_embeddings: bool) -> "str | None":
764	    """Remap MTP checkpoint keys for the draft model.
765	
766	    The embedding table is only a valid LM-head fallback when the source
767	    checkpoint ties word embeddings.
768	    """
769	    if key.startswith("mtp."):
770	        return key[len("mtp."):]
771	    if key == "lm_head.weight":
772	        return key
773	    if tie_word_embeddings and key in (
774	            "model.embed_tokens.weight",
775	            "model.language_model.embed_tokens.weight"):
776	        return "lm_head.weight"
777	    return None
778

# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
"""
Auto-dispatch model factory and parameter utilities.

``AutoModel.from_pretrained`` reads a checkpoint config, picks the right model
class, constructs it, and loads weights — the primary entry point for callers.

Custom model classes can be registered via :func:`register_model` to override
the default :class:`~models.default.modeling_default.CausalLM` for a given
``model_type`` string.
"""

import dataclasses
import logging
import os
from typing import Callable, Dict, Type

import torch.nn as nn

from .checkpoint.checkpoint_utils import load_checkpoint_config_dicts
from .checkpoint.loader import load_weights
from .config import (QUANT_FP16, QUANT_INT4_AWQ, QUANT_INT4_AWQ_MODELOPT,
                     QUANT_INT4_GPTQ, QUANT_MXFP8, QUANT_NVFP4, ModelConfig,
                     make_dflash_draft_config, make_mtp_draft_config,
                     module_quant_type)

__all__ = [
    "AutoModel", "load_model_config", "register_attention_scale_default",
    "register_model", "standard_attention_scale", "dtype_summary",
    "param_count"
]

AttentionScaleDefault = Callable[[int], float]
_MODEL_REGISTRY: Dict[str, Type[nn.Module]] = {}
_ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY: Dict[str, AttentionScaleDefault] = {}


def standard_attention_scale(head_dim: int) -> float:
    return 1.0 / (float(head_dim)**0.5)


_QWEN3_5_MTP_BASE_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset({
    "qwen3_5_text",
    "qwen3_5_moe",
    "qwen3_5_moe_text",
})
_QWEN3_5_MTP_DRAFT_MODEL_TYPES = frozenset({
    "qwen3_5_text",
})


def _is_qwen3_5_mtp_base_supported(model_type: str) -> bool:
    return model_type in _QWEN3_5_MTP_BASE_MODEL_TYPES


def _is_qwen3_5_mtp_draft_supported(model_type: str) -> bool:
    return model_type in _QWEN3_5_MTP_DRAFT_MODEL_TYPES


_GROUP_SIZE_LM_HEAD_QUANTS = frozenset({
    QUANT_INT4_AWQ,
    QUANT_INT4_AWQ_MODELOPT,
    QUANT_INT4_GPTQ,
    QUANT_MXFP8,
    QUANT_NVFP4,
})


def register_model(model_type: str, model_class: Type[nn.Module],
                   default_attention_scale: AttentionScaleDefault) -> None:
    """Register *model_class* as the handler for *model_type*.

    When :meth:`AutoModel.from_pretrained` encounters a checkpoint whose
    ``model_type`` field equals *model_type*, it instantiates *model_class*
    instead of the built-in :class:`~models.default.modeling_default.CausalLM`.

    Args:
        model_type:  Value of ``model_type`` in the checkpoint ``config.json``.
        model_class: ``nn.Module`` subclass; must accept a single
                     :class:`~config.ModelConfig` as its constructor argument.
        default_attention_scale: Function returning this family's default for
                     a given attention head dimension.
    """
    _MODEL_REGISTRY[model_type] = model_class
    _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY[model_type] = default_attention_scale


def register_attention_scale_default(
        model_type: str,
        default_attention_scale: AttentionScaleDefault) -> None:
    """Register a default for a model type with special factory dispatch."""
    _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY[model_type] = default_attention_scale


def load_model_config(model_dir: str) -> ModelConfig:
    """Load ModelConfig using the default declared by its model family."""
    root, llm_dict = load_checkpoint_config_dicts(model_dir)
    default_attention_scale = standard_attention_scale
    for config in (root, llm_dict):
        model_type = config.get("model_type")
        if model_type in _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY:
            default_attention_scale = _ATTENTION_SCALE_DEFAULT_REGISTRY[
                model_type]
            break
    return ModelConfig.from_pretrained(model_dir, default_attention_scale)


class AutoModel:
    """HuggingFace-style factory that dispatches on ``model_type``."""

    @classmethod
    def from_pretrained(cls,
                        model_dir: str,
                        device: str = "cpu",
                        key_remap=None,
                        key_prefix: "str | None" = None,
                        eagle_base: bool = False,
                        reduced_vocab_dir: "str | None" = None,
                        mtp_base: bool = False,
                        mtp_draft: bool = False,
                        tp_size: int = 1,
                        tp_rank: int = 0,
                        dflash_base: bool = False,
                        dflash_tree_base: bool = False,
                        dflash_draft: bool = False,
                        dflash_draft_dir: "str | None" = None,
                        gemma4_mtp_base: bool = False,
                        gemma4_mtp_draft: bool = False,
                        gemma4_kv_sharing_map: "list[dict] | None" = None,
                        gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant: "str | None" = None,
                        num_decoder_layers: "int | None" = None) -> nn.Module:
        """Construct and load a model from *model_dir*.

        Reads ``config.json`` via :class:`~config.ModelConfig`, looks up the
        model class in the registry (falling back to the built-in
        :class:`~models.default.modeling_default.CausalLM`), instantiates it,
        moves it to *device*, and loads safetensors weights.

        Args:
            model_dir:      Local HF checkpoint directory.
            device:         Target device (e.g. ``"cpu"``, ``"cuda:0"``).
            key_remap:      Optional callable ``(key: str) -> Optional[str]``.
                            Passed through to :func:`load_weights` for checkpoint
                            key remapping (e.g. TTS talker ``codec_embedding``
                            → ``embed_tokens``).
            key_prefix:     Explicit checkpoint key prefix to strip (e.g.
                            ``"talker."``).  Passed through to :func:`load_weights`.
            eagle_base:     When True, export as EAGLE3 base model with extra
                            tree-attention inputs and hidden_states output.
            reduced_vocab_dir:
                            Optional directory containing ``vocab_map.safetensors``.
            mtp_base:       When True, export the standard Qwen3.5 text model as
                            the MTP base variant.
            mtp_draft:      When True, build the dedicated Qwen3.5 dense MTP
                            draft model from the base checkpoint config.
            tp_size:        Tensor-parallel world size.  When >1 the config
                            is reduced to per-rank shapes via
                            :meth:`ModelConfig.for_rank`, and weights
                            are sharded on assignment.  Default 1 = no TP.
            tp_rank:        This rank's index in [0, tp_size).
            dflash_base:    When True, export as DFlash base model.
            dflash_tree_base:
                            When True, add DDTree parent/depth metadata inputs
                            for Qwen3.5 hybrid state execution.
            dflash_draft:   When True, build the DFlash draft model.
            dflash_draft_dir:
                            Path to the DFlash draft checkpoint directory.
            gemma4_mtp_base:
                            Export a Gemma4 target checkpoint as the base
                            engine for paired Gemma4 MTP.
            gemma4_mtp_draft:
                            Export/load a paired Gemma4 assistant checkpoint.
            gemma4_kv_sharing_map:
                            Validated assistant-layer to target-layer map for
                            Gemma4 MTP draft runtime config.
            gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant:
                            Target/base KV-cache quantization mode inherited by
                            Gemma4 MTP draft inputs that alias target KV cache.
            num_decoder_layers:
                            When set, truncate the model to only the first N
                            decoder layers (few-layer numeric validation).
                            Only supported for the plain default ``CausalLM``
                            path (e.g. Qwen3); rejected for eagle/mtp/dflash and
                            registered non-default variants. The checkpoint's
                            extra-layer weights are simply skipped by the loader.

        Returns:
            Loaded ``nn.Module`` in eval mode.
        """
        from .models.default.modeling_default import CausalLM

        config = load_model_config(model_dir)
        if eagle_base:
            config.eagle_base = True
        if mtp_base or config.mtp_base:
            config.mtp_base = True
        if gemma4_mtp_base:
            config.gemma4_mtp_base = True
        if dflash_base:
            config.dflash_base = True
        if dflash_tree_base:
            config.dflash_base = True
            config.dflash_tree_base = True
        elif config.dflash_tree_base:
            config.dflash_base = True
        if config.dflash_base:
            # Read target_layer_ids from DFlash draft checkpoint if provided
            if not config.dflash_target_layer_ids and dflash_draft_dir:
                import json
                draft_cfg_path = os.path.join(dflash_draft_dir, "config.json")
                if os.path.isfile(draft_cfg_path):
                    with open(draft_cfg_path) as f:
                        draft_cfg = json.load(f)
                    dflash_cfg = draft_cfg.get("dflash_config", {})
                    config.dflash_target_layer_ids = dflash_cfg.get(
                        "target_layer_ids", [1, 8, 15, 22, 29])
                    config.dflash_block_size = dflash_cfg.get("block_size", 16)
                    config.dflash_mask_token_id = dflash_cfg.get(
                        "mask_token_id", 248070)
            if not config.dflash_target_layer_ids:
                config.dflash_target_layer_ids = [1, 8, 15, 22, 29]
        if tp_size > 1:
            config = config.for_rank(tp_rank, tp_size)

        variant = _resolve_model_variant(config,
                                         eagle_base=eagle_base,
                                         mtp_base=config.mtp_base,
                                         mtp_draft=mtp_draft,
                                         dflash_base=config.dflash_base,
                                         dflash_draft=dflash_draft,
                                         gemma4_mtp_base=gemma4_mtp_base,
                                         gemma4_mtp_draft=gemma4_mtp_draft)

        # EAGLE3 draft: auto-detect from draft_vocab_size
        if variant == "eagle3_draft":
            from .models.eagle3.modeling_eagle3_draft import Eagle3DraftModel
            model_class = Eagle3DraftModel
            # Set up key remapping: midlayer -> layers.0, skip t2d
            if key_remap is None:
                key_remap = _eagle3_key_remap
        elif variant == "mtp_draft":
            # TODO: support other model types
            if not _is_qwen3_5_mtp_draft_supported(config.model_type):
                raise NotImplementedError(
                    "MTP draft is only supported for qwen3_5_text checkpoints; "
                    f"got {config.model_type!r}.")
            from .models.qwen3_5 import Qwen3_5MtpDraftModel
            tie_word_embeddings = config.tie_word_embeddings
            config = make_mtp_draft_config(config)
            model_class = Qwen3_5MtpDraftModel
            if key_remap is None:

                def key_remap(key):
                    return _mtp_key_remap(
                        key, tie_word_embeddings=tie_word_embeddings)

        elif variant == "dflash_draft":
            if dflash_draft_dir is None:
                raise ValueError(
                    "dflash_draft requires dflash_draft_dir to be set.")
            from .models.dflash.modeling_dflash_draft import DFlashDraftModel
            base_config = config
            base_model_dir = model_dir
            base_tie_word_embeddings = base_config.tie_word_embeddings
            draft_has_lm_head = _checkpoint_has_dflash_lm_head(
                dflash_draft_dir)
            config = make_dflash_draft_config(dflash_draft_dir,
                                              standard_attention_scale)
            if not draft_has_lm_head:
                config = _inherit_dflash_lm_head_quant(config, base_config)
            model_class = DFlashDraftModel
            model_dir = dflash_draft_dir
            if key_remap is None:
                key_remap = _dflash_key_remap
        elif variant == "gemma4_mtp_draft":
            if config.root_model_type != "gemma4_assistant":
                raise ValueError(
                    "Gemma4 MTP draft requires a gemma4_assistant checkpoint.")
            from .models.gemma4 import Gemma4AssistantForCausalLM
            config.gemma4_mtp_draft = True
            config.shares_target_kv = True
            config.has_own_kv_cache = False
            config.constant_draft_positions = True
            config.returns_feedback_hidden = True
            config.assistant_hidden_size = config.hidden_size
            config.kv_sharing_map = list(gemma4_kv_sharing_map or [])
            if gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant is not None:
                config.quant.kv_cache_quant = gemma4_target_kv_cache_quant
            model_class = Gemma4AssistantForCausalLM
        else:
            if (variant == "mtp_base"
                    and not _is_qwen3_5_mtp_base_supported(config.model_type)):
                raise NotImplementedError(
                    "Qwen3.5 MTP base is only supported for qwen3_5_text "
                    "qwen3_5_moe, or qwen3_5_moe_text checkpoints; "
                    f"got {config.model_type!r}.")
            if variant == "gemma4_mtp_base":
                if config.model_type not in ("gemma4", "gemma4_text"):
                    raise ValueError(
                        "Gemma4 MTP base requires a gemma4/gemma4_text target checkpoint."
                    )
                from .models.gemma4 import Gemma4ForCausalLM
                config.gemma4_mtp_base = True
                model_class = Gemma4ForCausalLM
            else:
                # DFlash base is supported for both Qwen3.5 hybrid (qwen3_5_text) and
                # dense Qwen3 (default CausalLM). Dense models use the Transformer's
                # dflash_target_layer_ids parameter to collect target-layer hidden states.
                model_class = _MODEL_REGISTRY.get(config.model_type, CausalLM)

        # 4-layer numeric validation: truncate to the first N decoder
        # layers.  The whole pipeline is config-driven (the Transformer builds
        # layers from ``config.num_hidden_layers`` / ``config.layer_types``,
        # ``onnx_export_spec`` derives the KV / recurrent / conv I/O counts from
        # them, the runtime config.json is written from ``model.config``, and the
        # loader silently skips checkpoint keys for the dropped layers), so a
        # single config override is sufficient and the modeling code needs no
        # change.  This covers the plain default ``CausalLM`` path (e.g. Qwen3)
        # AND registered hybrid base models (Qwen3.5 linear+full / Gated DeltaNet,
        # Nemotron-H Mamba), which also build per-layer from ``layer_types``.  The
        # eagle/mtp/dflash/gemma4-mtp speculative-decoding variants have a
        # different per-layer structure and remain out of scope.
        if num_decoder_layers is not None:
            if (eagle_base or config.eagle_base or mtp_base or config.mtp_base
                    or dflash_base or config.dflash_base or mtp_draft
                    or dflash_draft or gemma4_mtp_base
                    or config.gemma4_mtp_base or gemma4_mtp_draft
                    or config.gemma4_mtp_draft):
                raise NotImplementedError(
                    "num_decoder_layers cannot be combined with the "
                    "eagle/mtp/dflash/gemma4-mtp speculative-decoding variants."
                )
            if not 1 <= num_decoder_layers <= config.num_hidden_layers:
                raise ValueError(
                    f"num_decoder_layers={num_decoder_layers} out of range "
                    f"[1, {config.num_hidden_layers}].")
            config.num_hidden_layers = num_decoder_layers
            # Keep per-layer lists consistent with the truncated layer count.
            if config.layer_types:
                config.layer_types = config.layer_types[:num_decoder_layers]
            logging.getLogger(__name__).info(
                "num_decoder_layers: truncated to first %d decoder layers",
                num_decoder_layers)

        model = model_class(config)
        model.to(device)

        pre_repack_hook = None
        apply_reduced_vocab_after_load = False
        if reduced_vocab_dir is not None:
            from .vocab_reduction.onnx_export import (
                apply_reduced_vocab, load_reduced_vocab_map,
                should_apply_reduced_vocab_before_repacking)
            vocab_map = load_reduced_vocab_map(reduced_vocab_dir,
                                               vocab_size=config.vocab_size,
                                               device=device)
            if should_apply_reduced_vocab_before_repacking(model):

                def _apply_pre_repack_reduced_vocab(loaded_model: nn.Module):
                    apply_reduced_vocab(loaded_model, vocab_map)
                    loaded_model._reduced_vocab_dir = reduced_vocab_dir

                pre_repack_hook = _apply_pre_repack_reduced_vocab
            else:
                apply_reduced_vocab_after_load = True

        if variant == "dflash_draft" and not draft_has_lm_head:
            next_pre_repack_hook = pre_repack_hook

            def _load_pre_repack_dflash_lm_head(loaded_model: nn.Module):
                _load_dflash_lm_head(
                    loaded_model,
                    base_model_dir,
                    device,
                    tie_word_embeddings=base_tie_word_embeddings)
                if next_pre_repack_hook is not None:
                    next_pre_repack_hook(loaded_model)

            pre_repack_hook = _load_pre_repack_dflash_lm_head

        load_weights(model,
                     model_dir,
                     device=device,
                     key_remap=key_remap,
                     key_prefix=key_prefix,
                     pre_repack_hook=pre_repack_hook,
                     mapping=config.mapping)
        if variant == "dflash_draft":
            if draft_has_lm_head:
                logging.getLogger(__name__).info(
                    "DFlash lm_head source: draft checkpoint buffers")
        if apply_reduced_vocab_after_load:
            from .vocab_reduction.onnx_export import \
                apply_reduced_vocab_from_dir
            apply_reduced_vocab_from_dir(model, reduced_vocab_dir)

        # Post-load optimisation: fuse GDN input projections for Qwen3.5 / Qwen3.5-MoE.
        if (config.model_type in ("qwen3_5_text", "qwen3_5_moe_text")
                and not mtp_draft):
            from .models.qwen3_5 import fuse_gdn_input_projections
            fuse_gdn_input_projections(model)

        return model


def param_count(model: nn.Module) -> int:
    """Return total parameter element count (trainable and frozen)."""
    return sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())


def dtype_summary(model: nn.Module) -> Dict[str, int]:
    """Map dtype name -> number of parameter elements."""
    out: Dict[str, int] = {}
    for p in model.parameters():
        name = str(p.dtype).replace("torch.", "")
        out[name] = out.get(name, 0) + p.numel()
    return dict(sorted(out.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]))


def _inherit_dflash_lm_head_quant(draft_config: ModelConfig,
                                  base_config: ModelConfig) -> ModelConfig:
    """Make an old DFlash draft build a loadable shared lm_head.

    Older DFlash drafts may omit ``lm_head.*`` and reuse the base output head.
    When that head is quantized, mirror its layout only for the draft ``lm_head``
    so the fallback loader can copy the base sidecar tensors.
    """
    lm_head_quant = module_quant_type("lm_head", base_config)
    if lm_head_quant == QUANT_FP16:
        return draft_config

    draft_quant = draft_config.quant
    base_quant = base_config.quant
    use_base_group_size = lm_head_quant in _GROUP_SIZE_LM_HEAD_QUANTS
    if (use_base_group_size and draft_quant.quant_type != QUANT_FP16
            and draft_quant.group_size != base_quant.group_size):
        raise ValueError(
            "DFlash draft cannot share %s base lm_head with a different "
            "draft quantization group size." % lm_head_quant)

    layer_overrides = dict(draft_quant.layer_overrides)
    layer_overrides["lm_head"] = lm_head_quant
    excluded = [name for name in draft_quant.excluded if name != "lm_head"]
    quant_updates = {
        "excluded": excluded,
        "layer_overrides": layer_overrides,
    }
    if use_base_group_size:
        quant_updates["group_size"] = base_quant.group_size
    if lm_head_quant == QUANT_INT4_GPTQ:
        quant_updates[
            "gptq_zero_point_offset"] = base_quant.gptq_zero_point_offset
    quant = dataclasses.replace(draft_quant, **quant_updates)
    return dataclasses.replace(draft_config, quant=quant)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# EAGLE3 helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def _resolve_model_variant(config: ModelConfig,
                           *,
                           eagle_base: bool,
                           mtp_base: bool,
                           mtp_draft: bool,
                           dflash_base: bool = False,
                           dflash_draft: bool = False,
                           gemma4_mtp_base: bool = False,
                           gemma4_mtp_draft: bool = False) -> str:
    """Resolve the requested model variant while keeping EAGLE3 behavior intact."""
    if eagle_base and mtp_base:
        raise ValueError("eagle_base and mtp_base cannot both be enabled.")
    if eagle_base and mtp_draft:
        raise ValueError("eagle_base and mtp_draft cannot both be enabled.")
    if mtp_base and mtp_draft:
        raise ValueError("mtp_base and mtp_draft cannot both be enabled.")
    if dflash_base and dflash_draft:
        raise ValueError(
            "dflash_base and dflash_draft cannot both be enabled.")
    if dflash_base and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft):
        raise ValueError(
            "dflash_base cannot be combined with eagle/mtp variants.")
    if dflash_draft and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft):
        raise ValueError(
            "dflash_draft cannot be combined with eagle/mtp variants.")
    if gemma4_mtp_base and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft or dflash_base
                            or dflash_draft):
        raise ValueError(
            "gemma4_mtp_base cannot be combined with other speculative variants."
        )
    if gemma4_mtp_draft and (eagle_base or mtp_base or mtp_draft or dflash_base
                             or dflash_draft):
        raise ValueError(
            "gemma4_mtp_draft cannot be combined with other speculative variants."
        )
    if gemma4_mtp_base and gemma4_mtp_draft:
        raise ValueError(
            "gemma4_mtp_base and gemma4_mtp_draft cannot both be enabled.")
    if config.is_eagle3_draft:
        if mtp_base or mtp_draft:
            raise ValueError(
                "EAGLE3 draft checkpoints cannot be loaded as Qwen3.5 MTP variants."
            )
        return "eagle3_draft"
    if gemma4_mtp_draft:
        return "gemma4_mtp_draft"
    if dflash_draft:
        return "dflash_draft"
    if dflash_base:
        return "dflash_base"
    if mtp_draft:
        return "mtp_draft"
    if mtp_base:
        return "mtp_base"
    if gemma4_mtp_base:
        return "gemma4_mtp_base"
    if eagle_base:
        return "eagle_base"
    return "llm"


def _eagle3_key_remap(key: str) -> "str | None":
    """Remap EAGLE3 draft checkpoint keys.

    Handles all known EAGLE3 draft checkpoint variations:
    - ``t2d`` keys are skipped (but ``d2t`` is kept).
    - ``target_model.*`` keys are skipped (multi-target training artifact).
    - ``midlayer.*`` -> ``layers.0.*``
    - ``qkv_proj.{q,k,v}_proj`` -> ``{q,k,v}_proj`` (flatten old pipeline
      ``EdgeLLMAttention`` wrapper nesting, used by quantized checkpoints).
    - ``._pre_quant_scale`` -> ``.pre_quant_scale`` (modelopt internal naming;
      normally stripped by ``postprocess_state_dict()`` but not by per-module
      export via ``_export_quantized_weight()``).
    """
    if "t2d" in key and "d2t" not in key:
        return None  # skip t2d
    if key.startswith("target_model."):
        return None  # skip multi-target training artifact
    key = key.replace("midlayer.", "layers.0.")
    key = key.replace("qkv_proj.q_proj", "q_proj")
    key = key.replace("qkv_proj.k_proj", "k_proj")
    key = key.replace("qkv_proj.v_proj", "v_proj")
    key = key.replace("._pre_quant_scale", ".pre_quant_scale")
    return key


def _load_dflash_lm_head(model: nn.Module,
                         base_model_dir: str,
                         device: str,
                         *,
                         tie_word_embeddings: bool = True) -> None:
    """Load the DFlash draft lm_head from the base model checkpoint.

    Deterministic source selection (matching MTP pattern):
      1. Explicit ``lm_head.weight`` from the base checkpoint.
      2. Embedding fallback *only* when ``tie_word_embeddings=True``.
      3. Otherwise fail loudly — untied models must not use embeddings.

    This helper is used only for old DFlash draft checkpoints that do not carry
    ``lm_head.*`` tensors.  Quantized checkpoints, and dense checkpoints that
    explicitly save ``lm_head.weight``, are loaded by the generic checkpoint
    loader and must not be overwritten from the base embedding table.
    """
    import logging
    import os

    import torch

    from .models.linear import FP16Linear

    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    lm_head = getattr(model, "lm_head", None)
    if lm_head is None:
        logger.warning("DFlash draft model has no lm_head; skipping.")
        return

    from .checkpoint.loader import _build_shard_map
    shard_map = _build_shard_map(base_model_dir)

    if not isinstance(lm_head, FP16Linear):
        _load_dflash_quantized_lm_head(model, lm_head, shard_map,
                                       base_model_dir, device)
        return

    # --- Determine source key with strict priority ---
    lm_head_candidates = [
        "lm_head.weight",
        "model.lm_head.weight",
        "language_model.lm_head.weight",
        "model.language_model.lm_head.weight",
    ]
    embed_candidates = [
        "model.embed_tokens.weight",
        "embed_tokens.weight",
        "model.language_model.embed_tokens.weight",
        "language_model.model.embed_tokens.weight",
    ]

    # Priority 1: explicit lm_head.weight from base checkpoint
    source_key = None
    source_type = None
    for cand in lm_head_candidates:
        if cand in shard_map:
            source_key = cand
            source_type = "lm_head"
            break

    # Priority 2: embedding fallback only if tie_word_embeddings
    if source_key is None:
        if tie_word_embeddings:
            for cand in embed_candidates:
                if cand in shard_map:
                    source_key = cand
                    source_type = "tied_embedding"
                    break
        else:
            raise ValueError(
                "DFlash lm_head: base model at %s has "
                "tie_word_embeddings=False but no lm_head.weight found. "
                "Cannot safely fall back to embed_tokens." % base_model_dir)

    if source_key is None:
        raise ValueError(
            "Cannot find lm_head.weight or embed_tokens.weight in "
            "base model at %s." % base_model_dir)

    shard_path = shard_map[source_key]
    if source_type == "tied_embedding":
        logger.info("DFlash lm_head source: %s (tied fallback) from %s",
                    source_key, os.path.basename(shard_path))
    else:
        logger.info("DFlash lm_head source: %s from %s", source_key,
                    os.path.basename(shard_path))

    source_weight = _read_dflash_checkpoint_tensor(shard_path, source_key,
                                                   device)

    # --- Copy weight into model's dense lm_head ---
    if source_weight.shape != lm_head.weight.shape:
        raise ValueError(
            f"DFlash lm_head shape mismatch: source={source_weight.shape} "
            f"vs lm_head={lm_head.weight.shape}")
    with torch.no_grad():
        lm_head.weight.copy_(source_weight.to(lm_head.weight.dtype))


def _load_dflash_quantized_lm_head(model: nn.Module, lm_head: nn.Module,
                                   shard_map: Dict[str, str],
                                   base_model_dir: str, device: str) -> None:
    """Load quantized lm_head sidecar tensors shared from the base checkpoint."""
    import logging
    import os

    from .checkpoint.loader import _set_tensor

    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    source_prefixes = (
        "lm_head",
        "model.lm_head",
        "language_model.lm_head",
        "model.language_model.lm_head",
    )
    target_state = lm_head.state_dict()
    missing = []
    source_by_target = {}
    optional_tensors = {"g_idx", "int4_act_perm", "pre_quant_scale"}

    for target_name in target_state:
        source_key = next((f"{prefix}.{target_name}"
                           for prefix in source_prefixes
                           if f"{prefix}.{target_name}" in shard_map), None)
        if source_key is None:
            if target_name not in optional_tensors:
                missing.append(target_name)
            continue
        source_by_target[target_name] = source_key

    if missing:
        raise ValueError(
            "DFlash quantized lm_head fallback requires base checkpoint tensors "
            "for %s; missing %s in %s." % (", ".join(
                target_state.keys()), ", ".join(missing), base_model_dir))

    loaded_tensors = []
    for target_name, source_key in source_by_target.items():
        target_tensor = target_state[target_name]

        source_tensor = _read_dflash_checkpoint_tensor(shard_map[source_key],
                                                       source_key, device)
        source_tensor = _normalize_dflash_lm_head_tensor_shape(
            target_name, source_tensor, target_tensor)
        loaded_tensors.append((target_name, source_key, source_tensor))

    loaded = []
    for target_name, source_key, source_tensor in loaded_tensors:
        if not _set_tensor(model,
                           f"lm_head.{target_name}",
                           source_tensor,
                           mapping=model.config.mapping):
            raise ValueError(
                f"Failed to assign DFlash lm_head tensor {target_name!r}.")
        loaded.append(source_key)

    logger.info(
        "DFlash lm_head source: quantized base checkpoint buffers from %s",
        ", ".join(sorted({os.path.basename(shard_map[key])
                          for key in loaded})))


def _read_dflash_checkpoint_tensor(shard_path: str, key: str, device: str):
    import torch
    from safetensors import safe_open

    if shard_path.endswith(".bin"):
        state = torch.load(shard_path, map_location=device, weights_only=True)
        return state[key]
    with safe_open(shard_path, framework="pt", device=device) as f:
        return f.get_tensor(key)


def _normalize_dflash_lm_head_tensor_shape(target_name: str, source, target):
    if source.shape == target.shape:
        return source
    if source.numel() == 1 and target.numel() == 1:
        return source.reshape(target.shape)
    raise ValueError(
        "DFlash quantized lm_head shape mismatch for %s: source=%s vs "
        "lm_head=%s" % (target_name, source.shape, target.shape))


def _checkpoint_has_dflash_lm_head(model_dir: str) -> bool:
    """Return whether a DFlash draft checkpoint owns lm_head tensors."""
    from .checkpoint.loader import _build_shard_map

    for key in _build_shard_map(model_dir):
        mapped = _dflash_key_remap(key)
        if mapped is not None and mapped.startswith("lm_head."):
            return True
    return False


def _dflash_key_remap(key: str) -> "str | None":
    """Remap DFlash draft checkpoint keys."""
    if "rotary_emb" in key:
        return None
    return key


def _mtp_key_remap(key: str, *, tie_word_embeddings: bool) -> "str | None":
    """Remap MTP checkpoint keys for the draft model.

    The embedding table is only a valid LM-head fallback when the source
    checkpoint ties word embeddings.
    """
    if key.startswith("mtp."):
        return key[len("mtp."):]
    if key == "lm_head.weight":
        return key
    if tie_word_embeddings and key in (
            "model.embed_tokens.weight",
            "model.language_model.embed_tokens.weight"):
        return "lm_head.weight"
    return None

1 # Overview 2 3 > **Repository:** [github.com/NVIDIA/TensorRT-Edge-LLM](https://github.com/NVIDIA/TensorRT-Edge-LLM) 4 5 ## What is TensorRT Edge-LLM? 6 7 TensorRT Edge-LLM is NVIDIA's high-performance C++ inference runtime for Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) on embedded platforms. It enables efficient deployment of state-of-the-art language models on resource-constrained devices such as NVIDIA Jetson, NVIDIA DRIVE, and NVIDIA DGX Spark platforms. 8 9 ## Supported Platforms 10 11 ### Hardware Platforms 12 13 **Officially Supported Platforms:** 14 15 | Platform | Software Release | Link | 16 |----------|------------------|------| 17 | NVIDIA Jetson Thor | JetPack 7.x | [JetPack Website](https://developer.nvidia.com/embedded/jetpack) | 18 | NVIDIA DRIVE Thor | NVIDIA DriveOS 7.2 | [NVIDIA DRIVE Developer](https://developer.nvidia.com/drive) | 19 | NVIDIA DGX Spark (GB10) | DGX Spark software stack | [NVIDIA DGX Spark Developer](https://developer.nvidia.com/topics/ai/dgx-spark) | 20 | NVIDIA Jetson Orin | JetPack 7.2 | [JetPack Website](https://developer.nvidia.com/embedded/jetpack) | 21 22 > **Note:** The platforms listed above are officially supported and tested. Jetson Orin supports FP16, INT8, and INT4 model precisions. For exact build flags by platform and JetPack release, see the [Installation Guide](user_guide/getting_started/installation.md). 23 24 **Compatible Platforms:** 25 26 | Platform | Software Release | 27 |----------|------------------| 28 | NVIDIA Jetson Orin | JetPack 6.2+ | 29 30 > **Note:** JetPack 7.2 is the supported Jetson Orin path. JetPack 6.2+ remains compatible for FP16, INT8, and INT4 workflows. 31 32 33 ### Supported Model Families 34 35 TensorRT Edge-LLM supports the deployment of a wide selection of LLM/VLM/Omni/VLA checkpoints with speculative decoding draft support, including Qwen, Llama, InternVL, Phi, Gemma, Nemotron, Alpamayo, Cosmos, etc. For the complete support matrix, see **[Supported Models](user_guide/getting_started/supported-models.md)**. 36 37 --- 38 39 ## Key Features 40 41 - **🚀 High Performance**: Optimized CUDA kernels and TensorRT integration for minimum latency 42 - **💾 Memory Efficient**: Supporting 4-bit quantization for reduced memory footprint, with [FP8 KV cache](user_guide/features/FP8KV.md) support for additional memory savings 43 - **🔄 Production Ready**: C++-only runtime with no Python dependencies, designed for deployment on edge devices 44 - **🎯 Edge Optimized**: Built specifically for NVIDIA Jetson, DRIVE, and DGX Spark platforms with platform-specific optimizations 45 - **🔧 Rich Feature Set**: Supports [LoRA adapters](user_guide/features/lora.md), EAGLE3, MTP, and DFlash speculative decoding, [system prompt caching](user_guide/features/system-prompt-cache.md), vision-language models, and an [experimental high-level Python API/server](user_guide/examples/experimental-server.md) 46 - **📊 Complete Toolkit**: End-to-end workflow from checkpoint export to C++ runtime, with engine builder and examples 47 48 ## Key Components 49 50 > **Code Location:** `tensorrt_edgellm/quantization/` (checkpoint quantization), `tensorrt_edgellm/` (ONNX export), `experimental/server/` (Python API/server), `cpp/` (runtime), `examples/` (C++ examples) 51 52 TensorRT Edge-LLM uses a three-stage pipeline: 53 54 ```mermaid 55 %%{init: {'theme':'neutral', 'themeVariables': {'primaryColor':'#76B900','primaryTextColor':'#fff','primaryBorderColor':'#5a8f00','lineColor':'#666','edgeLabelBackground':'#ffffff','labelTextColor':'#000','clusterBkg':'#ffffff','clusterBorder':'#999'}}}%% 56 57 graph LR 58 HF_MODEL[HuggingFace Models
*including pre-quantized
checkpoints*] 59 PYTHON_EXPORT(Checkpoint-Based
Model Exporter) 60 ONNX_MODEL[ONNX
Model] 61 ENGINE_BUILDER(Engine Builder) 62 TRT_ENGINE[TensorRT
Engines] 63 CPP_RUNTIME(C++ Runtime) 64 SAMPLES(Examples) 65 APPLICATIONS(Applications) 66 67 HF_MODEL --> PYTHON_EXPORT 68 PYTHON_EXPORT --> ONNX_MODEL 69 ONNX_MODEL --> ENGINE_BUILDER 70 ENGINE_BUILDER --> TRT_ENGINE 71 TRT_ENGINE --> CPP_RUNTIME 72 CPP_RUNTIME --> SAMPLES 73 SAMPLES --> APPLICATIONS 74 75 classDef greyNode fill:#f5f5f5,stroke:#999,stroke-width:1px,color:#333 76 classDef nvNode fill:#76B900,stroke:#5a8f00,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff 77 classDef darkNode fill:#ffffff,stroke:#999,stroke-width:1px,color:#333 78 classDef inputNode fill:#f5f5f5,stroke:#999,stroke-width:1px,color:#333 79 classDef itemNode fill:#ffffff,stroke:#999,stroke-width:1px,color:#333 80 81 class HF_MODEL inputNode 82 class ONNX_MODEL,TRT_ENGINE itemNode 83 class PYTHON_EXPORT,ENGINE_BUILDER,CPP_RUNTIME nvNode 84 class APPLICATIONS darkNode 85 class SAMPLES nvNode 86 ``` 87 88 | Component | Description | 89 |-----------|-------------| 90 | **Quantization Package** | Creates quantized HuggingFace-style checkpoints for the checkpoint exporter. [Usage](user_guide/features/quantization.md), [Design](developer_guide/software-design/quantization-design.md) | 91 | **Checkpoint Exporter** | Reads HuggingFace checkpoints directly and exports ONNX artifacts. [Learn More](developer_guide/software-design/checkpoint-export.md) | 92 | **Experimental Python API and Server** | Provides a vLLM-style Python API and OpenAI-compatible server. [Learn More](user_guide/examples/experimental-server.md) | 93 | **Engine Builder** | C++-based application that compiles ONNX models into optimized TensorRT engines. [Learn More](developer_guide/software-design/engine-builder.md) | 94 | **C++ Runtime** | C++-based runtime that executes TensorRT engines with CUDA graphs, LoRA, and speculative decoding support. [Learn More](developer_guide/software-design/cpp-runtime-overview.md) | 95 | **Examples** | Reference implementations demonstrating LLM, multimodal, and utility use cases. See the [Quick Start Guide](user_guide/getting_started/quick-start-guide.md) and example guides in the User Guide. | 96 97 --- 98 99 ## Next Steps 100 101 Ready to get started with TensorRT Edge-LLM? Follow these steps: 102 103 1. **[Installation Guide](user_guide/getting_started/installation.md)** - Set up quantization and `tensorrt_edgellm` on your x86 host and build the C++ runtime on your edge device 104 105 2. **[Quick Start Guide](user_guide/getting_started/quick-start-guide.md)** - Run your first LLM inference in ~15 minutes with step-by-step instructions 106 107 3. **Examples** - Explore advanced workflows including [VLM inference](user_guide/examples/vlm.md), [speculative decoding](user_guide/examples/speculative-decoding.md), [ASR](user_guide/examples/asr.md), [MoE](user_guide/examples/moe.md), [TTS](user_guide/examples/tts.md), and [VLA model inference](user_guide/examples/vla.md) 108 109 --- 110 111 **For questions or issues, visit our [TensorRT Edge-LLM GitHub repository](https://github.com/NVIDIA/TensorRT-Edge-LLM).** 112
